text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru makes a brilliant<n>showing at
the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She breathes a sigh of relief, thinking<n>her next
race will not be as difficult,<n>but...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Fate decides her next challenge will<n>be the Kikuka
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The thought of another large-scale<n>challenge has
Matikanefukukitaru<n>shrieking with dismay.
